p0_probe.conclusion: All four required fields now fail parse on omission. No silent normalization.

items.description: accessMode default removed from processSourceReferenceSchema and sourceAttachmentSummarySchema
items.evidence: both diffs confirmed; tsx probe confirms rejection for process-surface schema

items.description: Negative parser tests added for all four missing required fields
items.evidence: 5 bootstrap cases + 12 action-schema cases (17 total); uses real production fixtures; parameterized assertions

items.description: HydrationPlan.fingerprint no longer empty string; real persisted fingerprint threaded
items.evidence: placeholder removed; getProcessWorkingSetFingerprint added to store; setProcessHydrationPlan stores fingerprint atomically before buildAdapterHydrationPlan reads it; throw on null is correct invariant guard
items.risk_investigated: fingerprint throw on first hydration cleared — setProcessHydrationPlan always precedes buildAdapterHydrationPlan and computes fingerprint within same Convex mutation

items.description: Checkpoint dependency guards collapsed from asymmetric OR to symmetric AND
items.evidence: || changed to &&; third vestigial condition removed; no production misconfiguration currently triggers the old divergent path
fingerprint comparison logic added; new 150-line dedicated test verifies stale projection and non-stale case

items.description: providerKind no longer accepts null in Convex schema or writers; all call sites updated
items.evidence: v.null() removed from schema validator, mutation args, and InMemory signature; fallback ?? existing.providerKind removed; all writers pass real EnvironmentProviderKind

items.description: unavailable added to ENV_STATES_WITH_ENVIRONMENT; test covers it
items.evidence: literal added to array; convex/processEnvironmentStates.test.ts has +25 lines covering deriveHasEnvironment for unavailable

items.description: Server pairs environment before process-to-waiting; client synthesis path removed
items.evidence: normalizeEnvironmentState function and its call site removed from client; normalizer leads with environment when publication includes process.status=waiting + environment; WebSocket ordering test verifies environment precedes process
items.tc_3_1a_assessment: assertion change (not.toBe -> toBe) correctly reflects semantic change; not a weakening
items.structural_note: pairing is conditional on publication.environment !== undefined; publishEnvironmentUpsert always includes both; gap is latent pre-existing, not introduced

items.description: tech-design.md adapter sketch updated to 6-method contract
items.evidence: collectCheckpointCandidate removed; providerKind property added; rebuildEnvironment return type corrected; matches implementation
return value changed from true to false; semantically correct for null-object store with no backing state
counts updated to 36/167/157/12; my gate runs confirm exact match

non_blocking_observations.description: Convex schema breaking change for existing providerKind:null rows
non_blocking_observations.detail: The providerKind column now rejects null. Any live Convex deployment with providerKind:null rows would need a migration. Not actionable pre-production.
Default param 'local' means tests constructing the service without explicit providerKind silently use local. Acceptable for tests; production app.ts wires env var correctly.
With the new throw in buildAdapterHydrationPlan, any test path through NullPlatformStore that triggers buildAdapterHydrationPlan would throw. This is correct failure behavior, not a hidden bug.

summary: All P0 items independently verified as closed via tsx probe. All nine non-blocking items from the synthesis are implemented correctly. Both gates pass. No regressions found. Three hidden risks investigated and cleared. Verdict is PASS.
